title: Claude-CLI – Run Claude Code in a throwaway Docker container
abstract: Claude-CLI? The name says it all! Imagine summoning a temporary Docker container with just a click, where your code springs to life. This is the "drop-in-and-code" experience you've been missing. No more waiting for environments—just start coding right away. Give this fun and easy tool a try and make programming more enjoyable!
abstract_zh: Claude-CLI？听这名字就知道是个好玩的家伙！想象一下，你只需轻轻一点，“ Claude”就会在你眼前蹦出一个临时的Docker容器，让你的代码瞬间起舞。这不就是那种“即开即用”的编程体验嘛？别再等环境配置了，直接上手写代码吧！快来试试这个轻松又好玩的工具，让编程变得更有趣！
